document_type.document_type: The legal nature of the transaction, for example Sale & Purchase or Gift of Residential Immovable Property.

transaction_type.transaction_type: The specific circumstances or parties involved in the transaction, such as Singapore Permanent Residents buying the first residential property.

duty_levied_on.duty_levied_on: The basis on which the stamp duty is calculated, typically the purchase price or market value, whichever is higher.

duty_rate.duty_rate: The percentage rate of stamp duty applied to the assessed amount.

month.month: The year and month (YYYY-MM) indicating the time period for the recorded data.

level_1.level_1: A primary classification label, such as 'Total', that groups the data into broad categories.

level_2.level_2: A secondary classification specifying the type of food service establishment, e.g., 'Cafes, Food Courts & Other Eating Places', 'Fast Food Outlets', 'Restaurants', or 'Food Caterers'.

value.value: A numeric metric representing the measured quantity or score for the specified establishment type during the given month.

quarter.quarter: The fiscal quarter and year during which the data was recorded, formatted as YYYY-Qn.

industry1.industry1: The primary industry classification for the observation, representing the main sector of activity.

industry2.industry2: A secondary industry classification providing a more specific sub‑sector within the primary industry.

industry3.industry3: A tertiary industry classification offering further detail or an alternative sub‑sector categorization.

total_paid_hours.total_paid_hours: The total paid hours recorded for the quarter, expressed in thousands of hours.

year.year: The calendar year in which the measurement was recorded.

level_1.level_1: The top-level classification of the data, often indicating an aggregated category such as 'Total'.

level_2.level_2: The second-level geographic classification, representing a continent or region.

level_3.level_3: The third-level geographic classification, specifying a country or subregion within the second-level region.

value.value: The numeric value of the measured indicator for the specified region and year, which may be positive, negative, or missing.

year.year: The calendar year in which the admissions were recorded.

number_of_admissions.number_of_admissions: The total count of admissions for the specified gender in the given year.

incidental_charges.incidental_charges: A description of the fee or charge type applied by the centre, such as deposits or optional items.

frequency.frequency: The recurrence interval for the charge, indicating how often it is applied (e.g., Once, Annually).

amount.amount: The monetary value of the charge expressed in Singapore dollars.

year.year: The calendar year during which the computer usage data was recorded.

age.age: The age group of individuals, expressed as a range of years.

entity_status_description.entity_status_description: Current status of the entity, e.g., Live, Ceased Registration, Cancelled, Struck Off.

uen_issue_date.uen_issue_date: Date and time when the UEN was issued to the entity.

year_of_assessment.year_of_assessment: The fiscal year for which the tax assessment data is reported.

no_of_companies_assessed.no_of_companies_assessed: The total number of companies that were evaluated for tax purposes during that year.

ci_before_reliefs_exemption.ci_before_reliefs_exemption: The corporate income before applying any reliefs or exemptions, representing the base taxable amount.

tax_exemption.tax_exemption: The total value of income or deductions that are exempt from tax under applicable laws.

gross_tax_payable.gross_tax_payable: The total tax liability calculated before any deductions or credits are applied.

tax_deducted_at_source.tax_deducted_at_source: The amount of tax that has been withheld at the source by payers before the company receives the payment.

other_tax_set_offs.other_tax_set_offs: Additional tax credits or set-offs applied to reduce the overall tax payable.

net_tax_assessed.net_tax_assessed: The final tax amount that the company is required to pay after all deductions, credits, and reliefs.

mother_race.mother_race: The racial or ethnic classification of the mother at the time of birth.

place_of_birth.place_of_birth: The type of location where the birth took place, such as a hospital or residence.

race.race: The demographic group or category of students, such as Indian, Malay, Others, or Overall.

industry2.industry2: Secondary industry classification, providing a more specific sub-sector within the primary industry.

year.year: The calendar year in which the justice case data was recorded.

justice_division.justice_division: The specific division of the justice system that handled the case, such as Civil, Criminal, Family, or Community Justice.

category.category: The broad classification of the case within the justice division, indicating the general type of legal matter.

subcategory.subcategory: A more detailed description of the case type, specifying the particular legal action or proceeding.

count.count: The number of cases or proceedings recorded for the given year, division, category, and subcategory.

year.year: The calendar year in which the space development status was recorded.

type_of_space.type_of_space: The category of real estate space, such as Office Space or Retail Space.

development_status.development_status: The current stage of development for the space, indicating whether it is planned, under construction, etc.

amount_of_space.amount_of_space: The quantified measure of space, likely in square meters or another unit, associated with the specified type and status.

year.year: The calendar year in which the data was recorded.

level_1.level_1: The primary category of the entity, indicating whether it is a Corporation or an Individual.

level_2.level_2: The secondary subcategory describing the sector or activity area, such as Arts & Heritage, Social & Welfare, Community, Others, Education, or Sports.

value.value: The numeric measurement associated with the entity and subcategory for that year, expressed in the appropriate units (e.g., monetary amount, count, or index).

noofchildren.noofchildren: The number of children the respondent has.

q20_q214.q20_q214: The respondent's answer to question 20/214, recorded as a binary Yes/No response.

ban_education1.ban_education1: Indicates whether the respondent has completed a specific education level, with Yes or No.

ban_q436.ban_q436: The respondent's binary Yes/No answer to question 436.

ban_q18_q194.ban_q18_q194: The respondent's binary Yes/No answer to the combined question 18/194.

socialnetwork_dp08.socialnetwork_dp08: Indicates whether the respondent uses the social network DP08 (Yes/No).

ban_personal_inc.ban_personal_inc: The respondent's personal income bracket, such as Low (below $3k) or Medium ($3k to $7.9k).

socialnetwork_5_slice.socialnetwork_5_slice: Indicates whether the respondent uses the social network 5 slice (Yes/No).

month.month: The year and month (in YYYY-MM format) for which the data is recorded.

level_1.level_1: The type of metric being measured, such as the number of air passenger departures.

level_2.level_2: The geographic region or area associated with the metric, for example North East Asia or Oceania.

value.value: The numeric value of the metric for the specified month and region, expressed in the appropriate units.

month.month: The year and month (in YYYY-MM format) when the energy consumption data was recorded.

housing_type.housing_type: The classification of the housing sector, such as Public Housing or Private Housing, indicating the ownership or management type.

dwelling_type.dwelling_type: The specific type or size of dwelling, for example 1-Room / 2-Room, 3-Room, 4-Room, 5-Room and Executive, or Landed Properties, describing the residential unit characteristics.

tg_consumption_gwh.tg_consumption_gwh: The total energy consumption measured in gigawatt-hours for the specified month, housing type, and dwelling type.

month.month: The reporting period, expressed as the year and month in YYYY-MM format.

total_foreign_reserve_sgd.total_foreign_reserve_sgd: The total value of Singapore's foreign reserves measured in Singapore dollars.

special_drawing_rights.special_drawing_rights: The amount of Special Drawing Rights held by Singapore, expressed in the same currency as the reserves.

imf_reserve_position.imf_reserve_position: Singapore's position in the International Monetary Fund's reserve pool, measured in the same currency as the reserves.

gold_and_foreign_exchange.gold_and_foreign_exchange: The combined value of gold holdings and foreign exchange reserves held by Singapore, expressed in the same currency as the reserves.

total_foreign_reserve_usd.total_foreign_reserve_usd: The total value of Singapore's foreign reserves expressed in United States dollars.

year.year: The calendar year for which the enrolment rate is reported.

level_of_education.level_of_education: The educational stage, such as lower or upper secondary education, for which the enrolment rate is measured.

sex.sex: The gender category of the students, where 'M' indicates male, 'F' indicates female, and 'MF' indicates both genders combined.

total_net_enrolment_rate.total_net_enrolment_rate: The percentage of the eligible population enrolled in the specified education level, expressed as a net enrolment rate.

year.year: The calendar year in which the vaccination data was recorded.

vaccination_type.vaccination_type: The name of the vaccine administered, such as Poliomyelitis or Measles mumps rubella.

no_of_doses_in_thousands.no_of_doses_in_thousands: The number of vaccine doses administered, expressed in thousands.

month.month: The year and month (in YYYY-MM format) for which the data is recorded.

level_1.level_1: A categorical label indicating the type of metric, here always 'Total Mail'.

value.value: The numeric count of total mail items for the specified month.

year.year: The calendar year for which the wage and employment data are reported.

occ_desc.occ_desc: A textual description of the occupation or job title.

estab_size1.estab_size1: The employment size category of the establishment, indicating whether all establishments are considered.

estab_size2.estab_size2: A more specific classification of the establishment size, such as 'less than 200 employees' or 'at least 200 employees'.

age_grp1.age_grp1: The age group of employees, expressed as a range of ages.

mthly_gross_wage_50_pctile.mthly_gross_wage_50_pctile: The 50th percentile (median) of monthly gross wages for employees in the specified occupation and establishment size group.

mthly_basic_wage_50_pctile.mthly_basic_wage_50_pctile: The 50th percentile (median) of monthly basic wages for employees in the specified occupation and establishment size group.

month.month: The year and month (in YYYY-MM format) for which the visitor arrival data is reported.

level_1.level_1: The primary category of the data, indicating that the figure represents total international visitor arrivals by country of residence.

level_2.level_2: The geographic region of the country of residence, such as Europe, Asia, or Americas.

level_3.level_3: The specific country or subregion of residence, e.g., Italy, CIS & Eastern Europe, United Kingdom, ASEAN, Netherlands, Hong Kong, Canada, or Switzerland.

value.value: The recorded number of international visitors arriving from the specified country or region of residence during the given month, expressed in the units used by the source (likely thousands of visitors).

year.year: The calendar year for which the wage data is reported.

occ_desc.occ_desc: The occupational title or job description of the workers.

ind1.ind1: The primary industry classification for the occupation, often a broad sector.

ind2.ind2: A more specific industry classification within the primary sector.

mthly_gross_wage_75_pctile.mthly_gross_wage_75_pctile: The 75th percentile of monthly gross wages earned by workers in the occupation.

mthly_gross_wage_50_pctile.mthly_gross_wage_50_pctile: The median (50th percentile) of monthly gross wages earned by workers in the occupation.

mthly_gross_wage_25_pctile.mthly_gross_wage_25_pctile: The 25th percentile of monthly gross wages earned by workers in the occupation.

mthly_basic_wage_75_pctile.mthly_basic_wage_75_pctile: The 75th percentile of monthly basic wages (excluding bonuses and other add-ons) earned by workers in the occupation.

mthly_basic_wage_50_pctile.mthly_basic_wage_50_pctile: The median (50th percentile) of monthly basic wages earned by workers in the occupation.

mthly_basic_wage_25_pctile.mthly_basic_wage_25_pctile: The 25th percentile of monthly basic wages earned by workers in the occupation.
